final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 vertical 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (小红书) content (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, unified aesthetic with ins-style, healing, sleep-therapy theme — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), each cell complete and centered, clear boundaries between cells for easy cutting into 9 separate posts
Subject: must include all 9 grid panels with specific content:
  Grid 1 (cover): large title "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", with soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask elements
  Grid 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", with phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Grid 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", with bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Grid 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", with air conditioner, thermometer, quilt
  Grid 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", with coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Grid 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", with bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Grid 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", with notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Grid 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", with clock, moon, bed
  Grid 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer "收藏这组，今晚试试看", with breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: cream white, light beige, pale oat, light caramel tones as main colors, with dark brown text, minimalist layout, light skeuomorphic illustrations
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, healing, sleep-therapy atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oat, light caramel dominant with dark brown text accents
Materials/textures: needs a premium magazine editorial texture — exact paper/illustration finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified above for each grid cell
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be 3:4 vertical ratio, 3×3 grid with clear cell boundaries, each cell must be independently cuttable, large readable text, comfortable white space, no cheap marketing feel, no excessive decoration, professional new media design aesthetic, Xiaohongshu viral cover quality
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, excessive decoration, English text, garbled characters, text overlapping grid dividers
